title: fetch_session URL: comment trailing-slash guarantee from url::Url
description: fetch_session builds the session URL as format\!("{}.well-known/jmap", self.base_url) with no explicit slash separator. This is correct only because url::Url Display for an origin URL always ends in a trailing slash (e.g. 'https://host/'). A contributor reading the line will not know why there is no slash, and may 'fix' it to include one, producing a double slash. A one-line comment stating the trailing-slash guarantee prevents this silent regression.
close_reason: Added trailing-slash guarantee comment to fetch_session in client.rs
